title: Pyrus rupicoloides

taxonomy: Pyrus rupicoloides belongs to the family Rosaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the rose family. This family includes many economically and horticulturally important species, such as apples, pears, and plums. Pyrus rupicoloides is a species of pear tree that is native to China.
